// <auto-generated by Tech-Cosmos Hub />
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TechCosmos.Core.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.EventBus.Runtime;
using {{HERO_NAMESPACE}};
using TechCosmos.InputSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.SkillSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.TargetingSystem.Runtime;
using UnityEngine;

namespace TechCosmos.Game.Adapters
{
    public sealed class CastFlowAdapter : IInputIntentHandler, ITargetResultHandler
    {
        private readonly List<CastActionDefinition> _actions = new();
        private readonly Dictionary<string, PendingCast> _pendingByRequestId = new();

        public void Configure(IEnumerable<CastActionDefinition> actions)
        {
            _actions.Clear();
            if (actions == null) return;
            _actions.AddRange(actions);
        }

        public void HandleIntent(in InputIntent intent)
        {
            if (!GameCompositionRoot.IsInitialized) return;

            if (intent.actionId == "Cancel")
            {
                CancelActiveRequests(intent.controller);
                return;
            }

            if (intent.phase != InputPhase.Performed) return;

            if (!TryGetAction(intent.actionId, out var action))
            {
                Debug.LogWarning($"[CastFlowAdapter] 未配置的 actionId: {intent.actionId}");
                return;
            }

            if (!GameCompositionRoot.EntityRegistry.TryGetTransform(intent.controller, out var casterTransform))
            {
                Debug.LogWarning($"[CastFlowAdapter] 找不到施法者 Transform: {intent.controller}");
                return;
            }

            var origin = ToFloat3(casterTransform.position);
            var direction = ToFloat3(casterTransform.forward);

            EntityHandle preferredTarget = EntityHandle.Invalid;
            if (action.preferredTargetBridge != null)
                preferredTarget = action.preferredTargetBridge.Handle;

            var request = new TargetRequest(
                requestId: action.triggerEvent,
                mode: action.targetMode,
                caster: intent.controller,
                maxRange: action.maxRange,
                origin: origin,
                direction: direction,
                preferredTarget: preferredTarget,
                radius: action.radius);

            _pendingByRequestId[request.requestId] = new PendingCast
            {
                ActionId = intent.actionId,
                TriggerEvent = action.triggerEvent,
                Caster = intent.controller
            };

            GameCompositionRoot.EventBus.Publish(new CastRequestedEvent
            {
                Controller = intent.controller,
                ActionId = intent.actionId,
                RequestId = request.requestId
            });

            GameCompositionRoot.TargetingHub.Request(request);
        }

        public void HandleResult(in TargetResult result)
        {
            if (!GameCompositionRoot.IsInitialized) return;

            if (!_pendingByRequestId.TryGetValue(result.requestId, out var pending))
                return;

            _pendingByRequestId.Remove(result.requestId);

            if (!result.IsSuccess)
            {
                if (result.IsCancelled)
                    Debug.Log($"[CastFlowAdapter] 施法取消: {result.requestId}");
                return;
            }

            if (!TryResolveHero(pending.Caster, out var casterHero))
                return;

            {{HERO_TYPE}} targetHero = null;
            if (result.target.IsValid &&
                GameCompositionRoot.EntityRegistry.TryGetOwner(result.target, out var targetOwner) &&
                targetOwner is GameEntityBridge targetBridge)
            {
                targetHero = targetBridge.Hero;
            }

            var ctx = new SkillContext<{{HERO_TYPE}}>(
                casterHero,
                targetHero,
                ToVector3(result.point));

            GameCompositionRoot.EventBus.Publish(new CastConfirmedEvent
            {
                Caster = pending.Caster,
                Target = result.target,
                Point = result.point,
                TriggerEvent = pending.TriggerEvent,
                ActionId = pending.ActionId
            });

            casterHero.TriggerEvent(pending.TriggerEvent, ctx);
        }

        private void CancelActiveRequests(EntityHandle controller)
        {
            var toCancel = new List<string>();
            foreach (var pair in _pendingByRequestId)
            {
                if (pair.Value.Caster == controller)
                    toCancel.Add(pair.Key);
            }

            for (int i = 0; i < toCancel.Count; i++)
            {
                var requestId = toCancel[i];
                if (!_pendingByRequestId.TryGetValue(requestId, out var pending)) continue;

                var request = new TargetRequest(
                    requestId: requestId,
                    mode: TargetMode.None,
                    caster: pending.Caster);

                _pendingByRequestId.Remove(requestId);
                GameCompositionRoot.TargetingHub.Cancel(request);
            }
        }

        private bool TryGetAction(string actionId, out CastActionDefinition action)
        {
            for (int i = 0; i < _actions.Count; i++)
            {
                if (_actions[i].actionId == actionId)
                {
                    action = _actions[i];
                    return true;
                }
            }

            action = default;
            return false;
        }

        private static bool TryResolveHero(EntityHandle handle, out {{HERO_TYPE}} hero)
        {
            hero = null;
            if (!GameCompositionRoot.EntityRegistry.TryGetOwner(handle, out var owner) ||
                owner is not GameEntityBridge bridge)
            {
                return false;
            }

            hero = bridge.Hero;
            return hero != null;
        }

        private static Float3 ToFloat3(Vector3 value) => new Float3(value.x, value.y, value.z);

        private static Vector3 ToVector3(Float3 value) => new Vector3(value.x, value.y, value.z);

        private struct PendingCast
        {
            public string ActionId;
            public string TriggerEvent;
            public EntityHandle Caster;
        }
    }

    [Serializable]
    public struct CastActionDefinition
    {
        public string actionId;
        public string triggerEvent;
        public TargetMode targetMode;
        public float maxRange;
        public float radius;
        public GameEntityBridge preferredTargetBridge;
    }
}
